quickPhrase.title: Quick Phrases
quickPhrase.manageDesc: Manage regular phrases for the current assistant and global phrases available to every assistant.
quickPhrase.contentPlaceholder: Enter the content inserted into chat input…
quickPhrase.assistantScopeDesc: Show this first for the current assistant only
quickPhrase.assistantScopeUnavailable: No assistant is bound to this input, so only global phrases are available
quickPhrase.globalScopeDesc: Available across all assistants and topics
quickPhrase.addFromInputDesc: After saving, insert it from the input lightning button or / panel.
quickPhrase.manageGlobalDesc: Manage global quick phrases available to every assistant.
quickPhrase.assistantManageDesc: These phrases belong only to the current assistant and appear first in the input phrase panel.
quickPhrase.deleteConfirmDesc: After deletion, this content can no longer be inserted from quick phrases.
